params.name: Athena Statue
params.source: Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Super Treasure Maps (0.03%), Wishing (0.08%)
params.description:
On Apr 1, 438 BC, Phidias carved this Athena statue for the Parthenon. 

The 13-meter-high statue of Athena is made of wood and inlaid with ivory and gold. As one of the gods of Olympus, she wears a battle helmet and a long Greek dress with serpentine trim. A human face is centered in the breastplate. The statue personifies more humanity than divinity. During the Byzantine Empire era, the original was destroyed, so only a replica remains.
